testcase.name: Vacancy List Page › user opens the vacancies list page
Vacancy List Page › user searches a job by title
Vacancy List Page › user views vacancy details
Dashboard Page › recruiter can view dashboard with vacancy list
Dashboard Page › recruiter can navigate to create vacancy page
Create Vacancy Page › form displays all required fields
Create Vacancy Page › user can create a new vacancy with full form interaction
Blackbox E2E User Journey › complete user journey - browse, search, view details, and navigate
Blackbox E2E User Journey › recruiter journey - view dashboard, navigate to create form
